mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rag_query_history ( user_id, task_id, question, answer, status, top_k, evidence_count, expanded_queries_json, evidences_json, diagnostics_json, progress_events_json, error_message, duration_ms ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{taskId}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{status}, #{topK}, #{evidenceCount}, #{expandedQueriesJson}, #{evidencesJson}, #{diagnosticsJson}, #{progressEventsJson}, #{errorMessage}, #{durationMs} )
mapper.update: UPDATE rag_query_history SET answer = #{answer}, status = #{status}, evidence_count = #{evidenceCount}, expanded_queries_json = #{expandedQueriesJson}, evidences_json = #{evidencesJson}, diagnostics_json = #{diagnosticsJson}, progress_events_json = #{progressEventsJson}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, duration_ms = #{durationMs}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, task_id, question, answer, status, top_k, evidence_count, expanded_queries_json, evidences_json, diagnostics_json, progress_events_json, error_message, duration_ms, created_at, updated_at FROM rag_query_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= #{startTime} AND created_at < #{endTime} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, user_id, task_id, question, answer, status, top_k, evidence_count, expanded_queries_json, evidences_json, diagnostics_json, progress_events_json, error_message, duration_ms, created_at, updated_at FROM rag_query_history WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND user_id = #{userId}
